nasb.text: He shall remain unclean all the days during which he has the infection; he is unclean. He shall live alone; his dwelling shall be outside the camp.

esv.text: He shall remain unclean as long as he has the disease. He is unclean. He shall live alone. His dwelling shall be outside the camp.

cnv.text: 在他患病的日子裡，他是不潔淨的；他既然不潔淨，就要獨居，住在營外。

ccb.text: 只要病不痊愈，他就不洁净，要独自住在营外。
